discoveredPages.title: Contact Us | Customer Care | Draper James
About Draper James – Our Southern Story
Careers | Join Our Team | Draper James
Privacy Policy | Your Information | Draper James

personCandidates.evidenceText: Our StoryI founded Draper James in 2015 for women (like me!) who wanted clothes that were special, not precious, easy to put together and always polished.

Our RootsOur name pays tribute to Reese’s grandparents, Dorothea Draper and William James Witherspoon, two of her biggest influences. The importance of family, friends and enjoying the big and small pleasures of life remain at our core.

Our StoresOur brick-and-mortar presence includes our Nashville flagship, a tribute to Reese’s hometown, our newest store in The Woodlands, Texas, and a location at Nashville International Airport — for the Draper James woman on the go.
